entry.title: The Dysfunctional Family Reunion
entry.summary:
Author: Sterek16_2003

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,231Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 43

Summary: When Booth's eldest son from his past life as Angel, Connor, shows up on his doorstep telling him he found his brother, Booth, and Bones embark on an adventure to bring him home. Followed by the tales of their lives as a complete family with Connor, Sloane, Christine, Hank, Booth, and Bones all under one roof.

entry.title: The Alpha Equation
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,876Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: When three rival wolves test Beacon Hills’ borders, Stiles panics and declares they need “an alpha-er alpha”, accidentally sparking a heated debate between the Stilinski twins over which Hale man embodies true dominance. As Scott insists he’s more than capable, Derek radiates silent intimidation and Peter exudes calculated menace, each twin fiercely defending their chosen alpha. But when the challenge becomes real, the pack discovers that the strongest leader isn’t the most terrifying wolf in the room. Its the one backed by them all.

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,062Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 147

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,233Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 51

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,224Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 12

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're not in the story yet, but I promise, they will be, and I will put it in the chapter notes when they're introduced. It will be worth it, so if you're here for that, I appreciate your patience!!!

entry.title: Yellow Paper Daisy
entry.summary:
Author: Babysterek

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,358Chapters: 22/25Kudos: 154

Summary: “Well,” Peter says at last, forcing a crooked smile into his voice, “at least this time he didn’t almost get us all killed.”Derek swallows. His throat is dry, the words scraping on the way out. “I was drunk.” They land and disappear without effect.Talia turns then, her gaze settling on him fully. It’s steady, unreadable, and it makes his shoulders tense despite himself. “You were careless,” she says. “You are a werewolf, and if you got drunk, you laced it with wolfsbane, you did it. Do you understand, In twenty-four years, every scandal has had the same root. You. At some point, it stops being bad luck and becomes character. And I am tired of pretending this is something that merely happens to you.”---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Derek just wanted a moment of quiet. Instead, he crosses a line with the last person he should trust.....old grudges, bad decisions and a mistake he keeps repeating. "He learned the shape of the poison once,from a woman who wore it like skin.Now hemlock blooms in his own hands,and he cannot tell where she ends and he begins. "

entry.title: The spell
entry.summary:
Author: nothing_much

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,459Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: He didn’t look back as he walked into the forest. He knew he was alone, no reason to look back. No one would be there. He would see Roscoe,but nothing else. No one followed him. He was completely alone. Peter was out of town, Derek was being distracted by Boyd and Isaac at just this moment. Cora was also being distracted by the girls. He had this planned. Now everything was up to him.

entry.title: the moon is the only witness
entry.summary:
Author: idgaf_as

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,412Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 83

Summary: A couple of minutes later, he feels Stiles begin to stir and press closer. Apparently, the living heater in the form of Derek suited him just fine. The boy turns onto his side, fully hugging him like a toy now, and buries his fingers into the fur at the scruff of his neck. Derek feels him press his forehead against the top of his head. He goes still, listening as Stiles’s pulse beneath his head begins to even out, becoming steady and strong. The sticky scent of exhaustion gradually gives way to the fragrance of peaceful sleep

entry.title: Wrong(Right)Turn
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,829Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: Stiles is still reeling from his breakup with Lydia a year ago, using punishing runs through the park to escape the memories that haunt him. But when a wrong turn leads him to a secluded clearing—and then to a mysteriously open car door—his routine shatters in the most unexpected way. Enter Derek, a confident stranger with emerald eyes and an invitation Stiles can't refuse and challenges everything he thought he knew about himself. Or the one where Stiles stumbles upon a half-naked Derek, ass up, denies his attraction until he can't, and discovers that healing a broken heart might just involve a mind-blowing hookup.

entry.title: Where Ashes Lie
entry.summary:
Author: TendreChaos

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 195,517Chapters: 34/40Kudos: 188

Summary: Stiles has always known he was different, that there was something inside him people were afraid of.In a society where the supernatural is hunted and contained, sorcerers are stripped of their names, their freedom, and their humanity. After months of captivity behind concrete walls, Stiles manages to escape and disappears into the woods, where he finds a rebel group willing to take him in. But trust is fragile and Stiles carries a secret, a power he barely understands and cannot share.Because if they knew the truth, if they knew what Stiles really was... They wouldn’t hate the cage that once held him.They’d build a stronger one.

entry.title: Growing Sideways
entry.summary:
Author: dandeliondick

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,827Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 22

Summary: He had wished he had some way to contact Derek. He used to send him emails every week during the hunt. He sent one every month that first year, but after a while it just slipped his mind, raising a kid and running a pack taking up his time instead of an outbox of unanswered emails. He doubted that Derek would ever come back, Beacon Hills had caused him nothing but pain since he was just a kid. He just wished he could meet Luke. He wanted him to see how strong and how good he was even after all of that. He wanted Derek to see Luke’s beta form and that his Blue eyes are a symbol of just how much he has survived. That everyday he sees Erica’s fire and Boyd’s steadiness in how Luke plays and talks. Maybe he wanted to show Derek that Beacon Hills was somewhere worth coming back to now, that it was a home now. - In blue ink, 54 W Beacon Preserve Dr, Beacon Hills. Derek didn’t take the napkin, he already knew the address by heart since Talia made him memorize it and the house phone number before the first day of kindergarten. The Hale house.

entry.title: Sacrifices
entry.summary:
Author: QueenOfAngst21

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,920Chapters: 6/54Kudos: 66

Summary: It's been two months, but the Void won't go away. With his brother turning against him and with nowhere else to run, Stiles looks to the place he least expects. If Beacon Hills is destroying him, then when better to run away? Three years later, with the fate of the Supernatural world in their hands, they return. But not everything is the same. He's an Alpha Mate; his eyes aren't normal - they are emerald. Mature Warnings Given When NeededFully Written - Updates every Wednesday + Friday

entry.title: The Voyeur
entry.summary:
Author: Sodomitical_Tales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,326Chapters: 20/39Kudos: 32

Summary: Stiles never meant to use his binoculars for anything but the force of good, but that’s probably how a lot of villains start out. The road to Hell and all that. But honestly, if the Universe didn’t want him to spy on his neighbours, it would have told Hottie McScowlface across the yard to buy a set of curtains when he first moved in.Or to work out with clothes on.Or to take his weekly conquests to another apartment for sexy times - one with curtains or without any windows at all. Thank God, it didn't.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: An Ode to Stiles's Butt
entry.summary:
Author: eviscer8

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 802Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: Stiles doesn't think his butt is good enough. And Derek let's him know he's wrong about that.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Baby Werewolf Doo Do Doo
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,890Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 1,088

Summary: The sheriff dang well knows his kid is lying to him. He wants answers, and answers to all the unexplainable stuff that has been happening in his town. He just didn't expect to get answers by saving a baby in the woods. So now, he is raising a baby werewolf, dealing with his son dating a werewolf, and why does Peter Hale - another flipping werewolf - keep looking at him like that?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
